subLocations.name: Via Purifico (Yuna's Path)
subLocations.prose: The party is split and sentenced to the Via Purifico. Yuna navigates the maze solo until she finds Kimahri and then Lulu via teleport pads. Work your way to the southern dead end to activate the glyph that unlocks the treasure room — that's where the Elixir, Black Magic Sphere, and other valuables are stashed.

subLocations.name: Via Purifico (Tidus's Sewers)
subLocations.prose: Tidus, Auron, and Wakka navigate the underwater channels. There's a shop chest near the start if you need supplies before Evrae Altana. The boss is undead — throw Phoenix Downs at it for ~9,999 damage each. Two Phoenix Downs kill it outright; don't use cure magic or Al Bhed Potions on it.

bosses.strategy: Yuna vs Isaaru's 3 Aeons: Grothia (Ifrit), Pterya (Valefor), Spathi (Bahamut). Summon your own version of each — your Aeons are stronger. Charge Overdrives before entering if possible. Yuna's Bahamut vs Spathi is the key fight.
Evrae Altana is undead — throw Phoenix Downs for ~9,999 damage each. Two Phoenix Downs kill it outright. Holy Water also works. Do NOT heal it with cure magic or Al Bhed Potions.
